result.full_text: Thanks for calling QIIME. One moment while we locate an account with your phone number. If you have an account with QIIME, press 1. If you are interested in joining QIIME or want more info on product and services, press 2. To report fraudulent or unauthorized account activity, press 3. To verify a QIIME account, please enter the phone number associated with your account, starting with the area code. To verify your identity, please enter the last four digits of your social security number. Thank you. you Now please enter the last four digits of your active card. Thank you. Press 7 at any time for your account balance. For the status of a direct deposit, press 1. To activate your card, press 2. To update your PIN, press 3. To request a new card or report your card lost or stolen, press 4. To file or receive the status of a dispute, press 5. For help updating your account information or logging in, press 6. To hear your account balance, press 7. you For assistance with a different Chime product or feature, press 8. To verbally describe your issue, press 9. To hear these options again, press star. For questions about your savings account or automatic savings feature, press 1. If you have a question about your checking account, press 2. If you need help with our Spot Me or Pay Anyone feature, press 3. To learn more about MyPay, press 4. For help with our rewards programs, including referrals and cash bonuses, press 5. you If you have questions about filing your taxes or your tax return, press 6. To hear these options again, press star. To go to the main menu, press 8. To learn about SpotMe and how to enroll, press 1. If SpotMe is enabled on your account and you're experiencing an issue, press 2. If you are calling about recent changes to your SpotMe feature, press 3. To learn about the benefits of Pay Anyone and how it works, press 4. you If you are trying to cancel a Pay Anyone transfer, press 5. If you are experiencing issues with Pay Anyone, press 6. To hear these options again, press star. To go to the main menu, press 8. Pay Anyone is the fastest way to send money to your coworkers, friends, and family. To use this free feature, open the Chime app and tap on the Pay Anyone tab. If you transfer money to a friend with a Chime account, the money will be available instantly. you If you transfer money to a friend who is not yet a Chime member, the recipient will receive an invitation to join Chime. Your friend will have 14 days to enroll and be approved for a CHIME checking account. If the recipient doesn't claim your transfer within 14 days, the funds will be sent back to your account automatically. Press star to repeat this message. Press 8 to go to the main menu. To end this call, please hang up. Press star to repeat this message. you Press 8 to go to the main menu. you. To end this call, please hang up. Goodbye. Hi. I have a question about pay anyone. What's the most money I can send to someone in a you day using pay anyone? I need to pay my landlord $800 for rent, and I want to make sure I can can do it all at once, can do it all at once, can do it all at once, can do it all at once, Thanks for watching!
